title: [IV/MTS]Q.M.P [Qawsed Military pack]
body:
Qawsed Military pack -  A pack that collects all the vehicles of the Cold War era, before modern conflicts.
The package will include equipment from the NATO-OVD-ODKB alliances OCP Style.
And from other countries that were not part of any of these alliances.

Take part in battles on the equipment of the Soviet tank-building school, and the NATO construction school

For the Mod to work properly, you also need to download:

IV: [Immersive Vehicles (Formerly Transport Simulator)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-transport-simulator)
OCP: [Immersive Vehicles (MTS/IV) - Official Content Pack - [OCP]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/transport-simulator-official-vehicle-set)

Official Discord Channel of Q.M.P [Q.M.P Discord](https://discord.com/invite/mKahyuQPzm)

particle credits and items icons goes and mechanics to mr.mulle, dl_dev, Qawsed
